nasb.text: ‘Therefore thus says the Lord God, “Because it is high in stature and has set its top among the clouds, and its heart is haughty in its loftiness,

esv.text: “Therefore thus says the Lord God: Because it towered high and set its top among the clouds, and its heart was proud of its height,

cnv.text: “‘因此，主耶和華這樣說：因為它樹身高大，樹頂在茂密的枝葉之上，又因它高大而心驕氣傲，

ccb.text: “因此，主耶和华说，‘因为它树干高大，树梢高耸入云，心高气傲，
